Flow.description: A&G Case Intake Flow - Comprehensive intake process for Appeals and Grievances
Flow.label: A&G Case Intake Flow

fields.name: Display_Welcome_Header
fields.fieldText:
Appeals & Grievances Case Intake


Welcome! Let's start by identifying the type of case you're creating.

fields.name: Complaint_Type_Initial
fields.fieldText: What type of case are you creating?

fields.name: Display_Member_Search_Text
fields.fieldText:
Member Search


Please enter member information to search:


Option 1: Search by Member ID alone

Option 2: Search by First Name + Last Name + Date of Birth

fields.name: Member_ID_Input
fields.helpText: Enter Member ID to search (e.g., MEM-001)

fields.name: Display_Select_Member_Header
fields.fieldText:
Search Results Found


We found {!var_MemberAccountsList} member account(s) matching your search criteria.


Please select the correct member account below to continue:

fields.name: Display_Member_Found_Header
fields.fieldText:
✓ Member Found


Please confirm this is the correct member:

fields.name: Display_Member_Details
fields.fieldText:
Member Information


Name: {!Loop_Get_First_Member.FirstName} {!Loop_Get_First_Member.LastName}

Member ID: {!Loop_Get_First_Member.Member_ID__c}

Date of Birth: {!Loop_Get_First_Member.PersonBirthdate}

Email: {!Loop_Get_First_Member.PersonEmail}

Phone: {!Loop_Get_First_Member.Phone}


Click Next to continue with this member, or Previous to search again.

fields.name: Display_Member_Not_Found
fields.fieldText:
⚠ Member Not Found


No member account was found matching the information provided:


Last Name: {!Member_Last_Name}

Date of Birth: {!Member_DOB}


Please verify the member information and try again, or contact your system administrator to create the member account.

fields.name: Complaint_Category
fields.helpText: Grievances: QOC, Access to Care, Interpersonal, Administrative, Timeliness | Appeals: Medical Necessity, Pharmacy, Benefit Denial, Reimbursement

fields.name: Complaint_Sub_Category
fields.helpText: Select the specific sub-category based on your selected category

fields.name: Display_Associated_Case_Header
fields.fieldText:
Associated Case Information

Provide details about the prior authorization or claim being appealed.

fields.name: Display_PA_Search_Text
fields.fieldText: Or search for an existing Prior Authorization:

fields.name: Display_Appealant_Header
fields.fieldText:
Appealant Information

Who is filing this case?

fields.name: Valid_AOR_Form_Missing
fields.fieldText: Flag: Valid AOR Form Missing (requires follow-up)

fields.name: Display_Good_Cause_Warning
fields.fieldText:
⚠ Late Filing Detected


This appeal was filed more than 60 days after the initial determination. Please document good cause for late filing.

fields.name: Display_Review_Header
fields.fieldText:
Review Case Information


Please review the information below before submitting the case.

fields.name: Display_Success_Message
fields.fieldText:
✓ Case Successfully Created


The Appeals & Grievances case has been successfully created.


Case ID: {!Create_Case_Record}

A&G Record ID: {!Create_AG_Record}
